name: Modified MR-1 medium (Cao et al. 2011) + 20 mM sodium lactate ([3-13C]sodium lactate for MFA) (PMC6255981)
description: Modified MR-1 medium (Cao et al. 2011) + 20 mM sodium lactate ([3-13C]sodium lactate for MFA) — medium reported in PMC6255981 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC6255981 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.verification: auto-extracted; O2/carbon verified from paper, full recipe cited from an external reference (manual review)
provenance.verification_note: PMC6255981 does NOT reproduce the modified MR-1 medium formulation (salts, buffer, N source, vitamins, trace elements) - it defers entirely to Cao et al. 2011. Only two facts are verifiable from THIS paper: carbon source = 20 mM sodium lactate ([3-13C] for MFA), and the experiments were run aerobically (shaking flasks 200 rpm; O2-permeable biofilm reactors).
